prestazioni: Forced induction conversion on the **2.0L TSI (CBFA/CCTA)** engine using a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** with a **custom 3.5" V-band downpipe** and **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate**, paired with a **Vargas GC Stage 2+ hybrid turbo kit** for 380-420whp on **93 octane** with a **Cobb Accessport V3** running a **custom E30 ethanol-blended map** (30% ethanol mix).

Full **034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts** and **Neuspeed torque arm insert** to eliminate **EA888 engine** movement under boost, combined with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (organic/copper hybrid) and **034 Motorsport lightweight flywheel** for rapid rev matching.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (24-way rebound, 12-way compression, adjustable top mounts) paired with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars**, **034 Motorsport subframe collars**, and **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms** for aggressive **RWD-like rotation** on the **PQ35 platform**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit** (Pandem) with **custom 3M Gloss Black wrap** and **carbon fiber front splitter** (extended 40mm over OEM), paired with **Volk Racing TE37SL 18x9.5 +38 front / 18x10.5 +30 rear** wheels (ET adjusted for flush fitment) and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires** (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear).

**OEM+ Euro-spec Scirocco R front bumper** (VW Part #5K0071183B) with **custom LED DRL delete** and **Genuine VW R-Line rear diffuser** (Part #5K0071184B), finished with a **custom 3" carbon fiber duckbill spoiler** (hand-laid by **Seibon Carbon**) for 15-20lbs of rear downforce at 120mph.

**Full interior carbon fiber trim** (dashboard, door cards, center console) from **Eurokraft** with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (cloth/alcantara, VW Part #5K0884015A) and **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses**, paired with a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (320mm, suede) and **OMP pedal set** for track-ready ergonomics.
